Records.description: Divergent one-loop box $I_4^D(m_2^2,p_2^2,p_3^2,m_4^2;s_{12},s_{23};0,m_2^2,0,m_4^2)$ with two opposite massive internal lines, $p_1^2=m_2^2$ and $p_4^2=m_4^2$. Contains single $1/\varepsilon$ IR pole. Result from Beenakker-Denner via replacement rule.

Results.resultTeXPreview: \frac{m_2^{-2} \left(\log \left(-W_1^+\right)-\log \left(-W_1^-\right)\right)}{2 \varepsilon s_{23} \left(W_1^--W_1^+\right)}+\frac{m_2^{-2} \left(H\left(\frac{1}{W_1^-+1},\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)-H\left(\frac{1}{W_1^++1},\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)+2 H\left(0,\frac{s_{23}}{m_2^2 W_1^--M_3^2 W_1^-+m_1^2-M_4^2+s_{23}}\,;1\right)-2 H\left(\frac{s_{23}}{m_1^2-M_4^2+s_{23}},\frac{s_{23}}{m_2^2 W_1^--M_3^2 W_1^-+m_1^2-M_4^2+s_{23}}\,;1\right)+2 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)-H\left(\frac{1}{W_1^-+1},\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)-2 H\left(0,\frac{s_{23}}{m_2^2 W_1^+-M_3^2 W_1^++m_1^2-M_4^2+s_{23}}\,;1\right)+2 H\left(\frac{s_{23}}{m_1^2-M_4^2+s_{23}},\frac{s_{23}}{m_2^2 W_1^+-M_3^2 W_1^++m_1^2-M_4^2+s_{23}}\,;1\right)-2 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)+H\left(\frac{1}{W_1^++1},\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)-2 \log \left(-W_1^-\right) \log \left(\frac{W_1^- \left(M_3^2-m_2^2\right)-m_1^2+M_4^2}{s_{23}}\right)+2 \log \left(\frac{m_1^2-M_4^2}{m_2^2-M_3^2}\right) \log \left(\frac{W_1^- \left(M_3^2-m_2^2\right)-m_1^2+M_4^2}{s_{23}}\right)+\log \left(m_1^2\right) \log \left(-W_1^-\right)+2 \log \left(-W_1^+\right) \log \left(\frac{W_1^+ \left(M_3^2-m_2^2\right)-m_1^2+M_4^2}{s_{23}}\right)-2 \log \left(\frac{m_1^2-M_4^2}{m_2^2-M_3^2}\right) \log \left(\frac{W_1^+ \left(M_3^2-m_2^2\right)-m_1^2+M_4^2}{s_{23}}\right)-\log \left(m_1^2\right) \log \left(-W_1^+\right)\right)}{2 s_{23} \left(W_1^--W_1^+\right)}+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
